pageContext.name: Bring on the Rain
pageContext.description: 'You're not the cat, you're not Selina, you're not the little girl in the alleys.'  The original art for Bring on the Rain was created for DC Comics' Batman#50. This image was issued as a variant cover to commemorate Batman and Catwoman's upcoming wedding. This limited edition was released to commemorate Batman's 80th Anniversary.  Add the Bring on the Rain Canvas art print to your DC Comics Fine Art collection today!
